purpose: Reduce the LiteDRAM open P&R failure to minimal ODELAYE2 output-buffer topologies.

cases.name: ODELAYE2 to OBUF
cases.error: ODELAYE2 'odelay' has DATAOUT connected to unsupported cell type IOB33_OUTBUF

cases.name: ODELAYE2 to OBUFDS
cases.error: ODELAYE2 'odelay' has DATAOUT connected to unsupported cell type IOB33M_OUTBUF

durable_json_policy: Generated cutout JSON netlists are not copied into the repository because each is about 9.7 MiB; regenerate them with the recorded flake JSON targets when needed.
inference: The LiteDRAM probe P&R blocker is reproduced by a one-ODELAY cutout, so the next work should focus on openXC7/nextpnr support for ODELAYE2 output-buffer packing or a valid LiteDRAM PHY output-delay topology adjustment. It is not explained by TinyStories, the full controller size, or the no-iopad versus iopad synthesis choice.
